entries.rationale_summary: Stop-loss breach: low_gbp (19.615) penetrated stop_price (21.50). Trade executed via DAILY_CHECK mode. Locks loss and improves cash position by ~4.74 GBP. Days held: 58 (meets minimum). Reduces portfolio to 5 positions, enabling future buys.
entries.note: Recommended execution at next market open or at market.
